PROD-001.title: Vintage Leather Jacket - Brown, Size M
PROD-001.description: Genuine leather jacket in excellent condition. Color: warm brown. Size: Medium (EU 48). No visible damage, minor scuffs consistent with vintage character. All zippers fully functional.

PROD-002.title: Wireless Gaming Headset - Black
PROD-002.description: Brand new in original box. Model: SoundBlast Pro X. Features: 7.1 surround, 50mm drivers, 20hr battery. Includes USB dongle and 3.5mm cable. Color: matte black.

PROD-003.title: Handmade Ceramic Coffee Set (6 cups)
PROD-003.description: Artisan handmade ceramic set. Includes 6 matching cups + saucers + serving tray. Glazed in cobalt blue. Each piece individually wrapped for shipping. Dishwasher safe.

PROD-004.title: Professional DSLR Camera Lens 50mm f/1.8
PROD-004.description: Canon EF 50mm f/1.8 STM lens. Excellent condition, used for 6 months. No fungus, no scratches on glass elements. Includes original lens caps and pouch. Mount: Canon EF.

PROD-005.title: Yoga Mat - Purple, Non-Slip, 6mm
PROD-005.description: Premium TPE yoga mat in purple. Dimensions: 183cm x 61cm x 6mm. Non-slip surface on both sides. Comes with carrying strap. Suitable for all yoga styles.

PROD-006.title: Summer Dress - Blue, Size M
PROD-006.description: Floral summer dress in sky blue. Size Medium. 100% cotton. Machine washable.

PROD-010.title: Smartphone Case - Clear Slim Fit
PROD-010.description: Ultra-thin clear case. Compatible with iPhone 14/15. Scratch resistant.

PROD-011.description: Authentic Swiss-made luxury watch. Serial number verifiable on manufacturer website. Sapphire crystal glass. Comes with original certificate and box.
